params.name: Count of Monty Christi
params.description:
On Aug 2, 1845 AD, The Count of Monte Cristo was published for the first time, becoming Daumas' magnum opus.
The Count of Monte Cristo takes place during the 19th century. Edmane, the Pharaoh's 1st Mate, was entrusted to deliver a secret letter, but he was framed and thrown into jail. During his imprisonment, his cellmate, Father Feria, taught him many things, including the location of treasure buried on the island of Monte Cristo. 14 years later, he escaped, found the treasure, and became ri …
